lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Intel/Windows-based servers remain the dominant server platform. Windows Server 2022/2025 on Xeon processors is the mainstream enterprise server configuration.', 'source': 'General knowledge'}

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'legacy-supported', 'notes': 'Unix enterprise servers (AIX, HP-UX, Solaris, SPARC) are in long-term decline. lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'end-of-life', 'notes': "Intel Itanium (referred to as 'Titanium' in this collection) reached full end-of-life. The platform is definitively end-of-life.", 'source': 'https://www.spectrumsourcing.com/spectrum-news-feed/industry-update-hpe-to-end-itanium-support-by-december-31-2025'}
notes: Common 64-bit architecture for future Windows and Unix operating environments; both HP and Compaq working with Itanium.

lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'active', 'notes': 'Linux kernel actively developed. Dominates cloud, server, embedded, and Android markets.', 'source': 'General knowledge'}
